info.title: Admin API
info.description: Admin endpoints for managing firmware depots, channels, and gears.

put.summary: Create or update depot info (file manifest)
Roll back stable channel to the rollback snapshot
Upload a firmware release tarball for a channel
Create or update a MiniMax tenant

post.summary: Sync voices from a MiniMax tenant into the global voice catalog

409.description: Voice cannot be modified because source is sync

put.summary: Create or update a workspace template

get.summary: Resolve gear public key by serial number
Resolve gear public key by IMEI
List gears by firmware depot and channel

post.summary: Approve a gear with a given role
Refresh gear info from connected device

description.example: primary MiniMax tenant for CN voices

provider_voice_id.description: Upstream provider voice identifier. Present for synced voices.

cursor.name: cursor
cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous list response

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of items to return. Omitted or non-positive values use the default page size; values above 200 are clamped.

voiceProviderName.name: providerName
voiceProviderName.description: Filter voices by provider instance name
